title: What if the secret of the Evangelions were revealed
display_title: What if the secret of the Evangelions were revealed
wikitext:
[]: What if the secret of the Evangelions were revealed?             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Feb 04, 2007 11:12 pm wat if, the general public found out about the Secret of the Eva and how it makes the ATF, and that they're all clones of Adam (Lilith for unit 01). most people in Nerv, themselves, dont even know about it. would that create a problem for Nerv?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Feb 04, 2007 11:29 pm Please, oh pleaseeee tell me that isn't a serious question!

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Feb 04, 2007 11:51 pm That question sounds awfully rhetorical to me.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Feb 04, 2007 11:56 pm im bored, and i cant think of anything better to ask

[]:             Quote Post by brainDamage » Mon Feb 05, 2007 12:04 am sometimes, the only stupid question is the one created out of boredom to fill a void, but seriously, I'm sure most people would be like "shit! thats crazy" but if it saves them, the I'm sure they wouldn't protest.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Feb 05, 2007 12:14 am brainDamage wrote: but seriously, I'm sure most people would be like "shit! thats crazy" but if it saves them, the I'm sure they wouldn't protest.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Feb 05, 2007 12:22 am brainDamage wrote: but seriously, I'm sure most people would be like "shit! thats crazy" but if it saves them, the I'm sure they wouldn't protest.

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Tue Feb 06, 2007 1:05 am Secret of the Evangelions: Yui has a penis.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Tue Feb 06, 2007 10:57 am Trigger's Elysium wrote: Secret of the Evangelions: Yui has a penis.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Feb 11, 2007 3:07 am Reposting the part of my response that initiated the tangent but isn't really part of it. --Reichu Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Would the Evas save them anymore after such a disclosure?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Feb 11, 2007 12:28 pm cat42 wrote: UNIT-00 however... What is it with that cod piece anyway?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Feb 11, 2007 1:06 pm Sachiel_13 wrote: cat42 wrote: UNIT-00 however... What is it with that cod piece anyway?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Feb 11, 2007 1:18 pm A cod-piece covers the cods as might be expected.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Feb 12, 2007 1:11 am whoops, i want exactly paying attention to what it said

[]:             Quote Post by Conrad Gray » Tue Feb 13, 2007 10:34 pm The United Nations and the public in general clamps down on NERV. However, strings are pulled and the Eva project continues as it is (but with expansions closely monitored), and several pardons are made because without the Evas Earth is still screwed. However, unless the U.N. is canny enough (and I doubt they are, they let Japan pretty much take the lead in saving the world without giving a second thought to how much power and resources they're putting in the hands of one group of people), SEELE will continue their machinations. Though if you meant by "the secret of the Evangelions" included "everything we as people who watched the show know", then SEELE is screwed. They're just a group of old, albeit rich and powerful, men. And hopefully someone will dose the poor Eva pilots with massive amounts of therapy, antidepressants, and spoiling when their mission's over.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Feb 13, 2007 10:39 pm Antidepressants: Only if it works for them, therapy and spoiling: YES, major yes! LOLZ THEY ALL NEED TO GET LAID, THEN THEY'LL FEEL BETTER :mrgreen: Not that I'd know. Yet, anyway. T_T

[]:             Quote Post by Conrad Gray » Tue Feb 13, 2007 10:40 pm Exactly. If everything went public, they'll be perceived as poor sweet heroes to the media, and groupies for everybody.

[]:             Quote Post by BLACKANGEL32076 » Wed Feb 14, 2007 9:06 pm Conrad Gray wrote: The United Nations and the public in general clamps down on NERV. However, strings are pulled and the Eva project continues as it is (but with expansions closely monitored), and several pardons are made because without the Evas Earth is still screwed. However, unless the U.N. is canny enough (and I doubt they are, they let Japan pretty much take the lead in saving the world without giving a second thought to how much power and resources they're putting in the hands of one group of people), SEELE will continue their machinations. Though if you meant by "the secret of the Evangelions" included "everything we as people who watched the show know", then SEELE is screwed. They're just a group of old, albeit rich and powerful, men. And hopefully someone will dose the poor Eva pilots with massive amounts of therapy, antidepressants, and spoiling when their mission's over.

[]:             Quote Post by Omegagouki » Wed Feb 14, 2007 11:27 pm BLACKANGEL32076 wrote: Unless of course some people from the UN deciede to kill off the old men first. Who? I don't know, but this would have to happen first to keep this clamp down from happening.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Thu Feb 15, 2007 12:40 am Sachiel_13 wrote: cat42 wrote: UNIT-00 however... What is it with that cod piece anyway?
